channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: spaceX IPO — 43 replies — 172.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
spaceX IPO

Open thread • Replies: 43 • Updated: 2026-06-12 10:39 UTC

OP

are we ready for the biggest scam in history of histories?

ELON MUSK, YOU FAGGGOT

when will your ponzi scheme finally collapse, you fucking hobo

Early replies (first 3)

62351469
>>62351461
like 8 different brokers and crypto apps have shilled this shit to me fucking lmao

are they gonna rape retail instantly or let it pump for a few days before the raping?

62351500
It's actually going to be a repeat of the ICP ico isn't it?

62351509
>>62351469
>are they gonna rape retail instantly or let it pump for a few days before the raping?
supposedly this is entering indexes in 15 days

total scam of scams. can't believe this is fucking happening. everyone (ameriburgers) about to get raped

i'm not american but I would've voted for the faggot. but this...
it would've either been: continuation of woke lunacy or scams

hard times
>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AEB6ibtdPZc

>are they gonna
the cult is real. it will pump and potentially crater with ai bust in 6-12 months (or god knows when or if)

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62351576
>>62351548
about the only good thing this faggot did, was to put all the liberal dollars he received to semi decent use. compared to the lunacy on the other side
other than that, he's a mega shameful-autist scammer

62351581
>>62351572
He wants to build an army + his own country. He wants to liberate us from our oppressive governments. Poorfags like you wouldn’t understand

62351589
>>62351581
i guess bro

62351702
Surely it will go up for a brief moment once trading opens right?

62353489
I was around for the RIVIAN ipo in November 2021.
This is gonna be a similar shitshow

62353723
It might drop initially, but I think SpaceX is only going to get bigger in the long run.

62353776
Personally I think they’re gonna gigapump this one. It’s pretty suspicious that everything tanked a few days before the IPO. Not to mention the stupid index fund fast track.

62353811
>>62351572
>like go do retarded human animal bullshit that doesn't matter, like bro, go live a life that can be easily comprehended and respected by a stray dog, tickle your neurons with trivial pleasures which simpletons crave
kek
no

62353817
>>62351702

I thought that about Hawk Tuah coin, but here we are

62353874
>>62353489
"shitshow" is kind of an understatement, that would be trillions (plural) lost valuation after the initial pump

62353895
>>62353817
>Hawk Tuah coin
that had better fundamentals.

62353899
>>62351461
SpaceX is big scam ! Elon is nazi scammer ! I never buying SpaceX scam stocks , I am indian ,,

62353901
>>62353723
It's legitimately the most important company in the world lmfao. I've been waiting for this for a decade.

62354010
>>62351509
>continuation of woke lunacy
shut the fuck up retard, "woke lunacy" is better than the spite-filled shitshow that's happening now. white people feeling sad about being yesterday's news is not a valid political problem. kys pedophile

62354013
This shit is going to pump to ~$170.. I know Hyperliquid isn't the stock market but it's like poll where you only need a small sample to know the results of a bigger event.

62354047
>>62351461
BEHOLD

62354054
>>62351572
He is going to spend it all on making the US 95% Indian.

62354063
I remember tards on Yahoo finance saying Facebook stock would never be worth more than the IPO.

62354081
It's going to launch.
the recent dip was a big money taking a deep breath for this event.

62354979
>>62353811
wtf do u mean nigger he should spend time with his kids, show them a good nice life with two present good parents so they dont get even more fucked up and all 14 end up trooning out

hes a useless nigger with a ridiculous ego

62354991
>>62351509
> supposedly this is entering indexes in 15 days
Only NASDAQ right?
MSCI world and S&P are still safe

62355010
i asked for 8 shares i received 2 at 135$, will this be enough to make it?

62355175
>>62351469
My guess is that everyone is expecting it to dump directly so it will pump much longer than anyone expects, just so that even the last laggards fomo in, and then it will giga dump

62355216
>>62354013
hyperliquid are a bunch of degen gamblers. I dont think anyone will have the balls to short the real thing.

62355225
Elon Musk is such a great IQ filter. The dumber you are the more you hate him

62355239
>>62355010
extremely bullish
buy more at opening

62355509
>>62355225
I don't hate him, i kind of like the guy.

62355539
>>62351572
>find a nice woman your age to date
He's rich enough to get a woman 10 years younger than him

62355558
Gonna put 100€ is that enough to make it?
I dont wanna get raped too hard on the exchange rates. What time do burger markets open?

62355569
>>62355175
this

item.title: FUCK THESE STUPID FUCKING ROCKS — 19 replies — 76.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
FUCK THESE STUPID FUCKING ROCKS

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-06-12 10:39 UTC

OP

FUCK THESE STUPID FUCKING ROCKS

Early replies (first 3)

62349745
>>62349741
Reactionaries lose, so being a reactionary. Simple as.
Or don't, idgaf what you do.

62349747
>>62349741
why not just use your gold for something didn't you guys claim you can build computer parts with it?

62349748
>>62349747
Nigga a v2 rocket needs 40 tonnes of godl!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62349783
>>62349741
Top buyers should go for spacex now.

62349788
>>62349741
Careful, they're bendy rocks :)

62351391
>>62349745
Good little bag holder! Glad I sold 10oz of gold last month. I'll let you hold onto it for me and pick it back up when it's $2k per ounce.

62351402
>>62349741
Expect gold to crash further. Iran just declared they will no longer allow any ships to pass through the strait of Hormuz, regardless of whether they pay a toll or not. So, interest rates are about to go higher, and cash-strapped commodity importers are about to liquidate gold reserves to stay solvent.

62351447
>>62351402
Is 2000 possible?

62351450
>>62351391
>back up when it's $2k per ounce.

In all seriousness, is this possible?

62351487
>>62351450
Is the USD still being printed to pay for the interest debt for printing more USD?

62351488
>>62351487
Please give me a yes or no answer

62351517
>>62351450
No.
Are you panicking? we won't even go below 3.5k.

62351543
>>62351517
It needs to gp back to 2000 so I can buy

62351604
>>62349741
>He literally bought shiny rocks

62351754
>he bought shiny rocks
>at the multi decade top

62355451
haha

62355500
>>62349741

62355524
>>62349741
best i can do is 3k EOY

62355566
>>62349741
You bought late in the bubble moron. Get mining stocks. And I mean the small ones that have plenty of room to grow and expand while the price of gold is hovering around 4k. Just about every metal has not been mined enough for decades due to price suppression of silver. Silver price suppression also affected gold prices making it pump up higher than it should have.

item.title: How will this affect South Koreas economy? — 19 replies — 53.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
How will this affect South Koreas economy?

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-06-12 10:20 UTC

OP

How will this affect South Koreas economy?

Should I go all-in on a SK index fund?

Early replies (first 3)

62350030
>>62349989
I like that he recognizes bald suffering, but the issue is mostly rampant feminism, so effectively, he is an enabler.

62350349
>>62349989
by shaving you no longer have to worry about styling your hair and it's a repellent for nasty and bad women

62350516
>>62350349
>just bend over and let the norwood reaper fuck you in the ass

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62350557
in the usa you should be able to pay for finasteride and minoxidil with an HSA. hair is protection from skin cancer.

62350562
>>62350349
You dont look like a 90s skinhead, you skinnyfat onions baldy.

62350565
>>62350557
Almost everywhere in the world generic finasteride options cost like $20-30 for an entire years supply.

Are the pharma companies scamming burgers by overcharging finasteride like they do with most other meds?

62350592
Baldy, baldy over there...

62350594
>>62350565
Except fin is a tranny drug poison. Post finasteride syndrome reddit has 15k unique weekly visits.

62350624
>>62350594
About 20% of men between 18-35 (who arent on fin) develop ED.

When people who do take fin develop ED, of course the drug that nukes users dicks (temporarily) 1% of the time is what they'll blame it on, while in reality it's something else entirely. I'd bet the number of finasteride users who develop permanent ED is pretty close to 20%, the same percentage as men who don't use it.

62350707
>>62349989
Just make it socially acceptable to wear hats everywhere. I am balding and I just wear a hat all the time and I was still able to get laid. Basically by the time I make it to the point the hat comes off it is too late and the sex happens anyway. I'd imagine this is what it is like when trans women trick straight men into bed with them.

62350754
>>62350707

62350920
>>62349989
attractive men = baby boom

62351695
mandatory plastic surgery
everyone looks like kpop
big orgy ensues

62351707
>>62350594
Finasteride has a half life of 6 hours and PFS is a fake condition invented by American grifters and bald cucks.

62351757
>>62349989
good work mr president, that outta improve the birth rate

62352443
>>62350565
20 a year? I pay 9 a month
t. eufag

62352757
>>62352443
I’m eu too and I get a 98-pack of 5mg for about €35. Split the 5mg into 4 pieces and you have 392 doses.

Never heard of anyone actually being prescribed individual 1mg tablets here. Pretty much all doctors prescribe the 5mg option and tell them to split it in 4

62352787
>>62350565
no, it is also cheap in the US. it’s just annoying that you can’t buy it with an HSA. it’s also annoying that you need a prescription. should be OTC.

62355508
>>62350624
>>62351707
Literally everyone develops watery semen on it, have fun taking that poison that will fuck you up after some years, instead of just getting a toupe.

item.title: SWIFT confirms Chainlink as the bedrock of their systems — 13 replies — 52.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
SWIFT confirms Chainlink as the bedrock of their systems

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-06-12 10:38 UTC

OP

Kek fudniggers

Early replies (first 3)

62354945
>Inb4 source
https://www.icmagroup.org/assets/documents/Regulatory/Repo/ICMA-report-DLT-and-repo-part-I-June-2026-040626.pdf

62354971
it's all so tiring
i have sold much more of my stack than i wanted assuming that price would react by now

62354976
>>62354943
Cool, when will I be rich?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62355034
>>62354976
When clarity act allows staking pools to expand, when the full 1 billion is distributed, when there is supply shock, when payment abstraction is properly in place

When link is needed basically

62355051
>>62355034
Cool, he asked when. So when? No need to type out all that bullshit that many of us don’t understand.

Fucking cocksucking bitch.

62355053
>>62355051
Oh, I didn't realise you were a fuddie faggot. Like 3 years

62355059
>Fucking cocksucking bitch mader benchod

62355125
>>62354943
It's absolutely insane how (((they))) managed to suck all the hype out of Swift through years of ruthless Bitcoin dumps on all news.

62355130
>>62355034
Link has been needed since day 1 of mainnet back in 2019.

kys spammy

62355139
>>62355130
Friendly fire

62355143
>>62355139
absolutely not

62355153
Swift basically the guy who tried to put a motor on his horse carriage

62355562
shut the fuck up and just take the goddamn covid vaccine you fucking incels have gone too far this time

item.title: He's now worth $1 trillion, approximately the GDP of Poland. — 12 replies — 45.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
He's now worth $1 trillion, approximately the GDP of Poland.

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-06-12 10:25 UTC

OP

He's now worth $1 trillion, approximately the GDP of Poland. Do you agree that he needs to start punishing his detractors directly? Someone this rich should not be insulted any more than the kings of the past.

Early replies (first 3)

62355366
Completely meaningless comparison. He can't cash out that trillion. And GDP can be manipulated and defined in many ways

62355372
>>62355222
Net worth isn't influence. Elon is the global equivalent of a redneck lottery winner. No one takes him seriously. He couldn't even last 6 months as a White House advisor because he was so stupid he hired nothing but 20 year old broccoli head zoomers.

62355379
elon musk is gayyyyyyy

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62355381
>>62355372
>Elon is the global equivalent of a redneck lottery winner. No one takes him seriously

Back to r***it, loser

62355390
>>62355381
Why did he get kicked out of the leader of the free world's cabinet then? Jews or some other inane bullshit? Or because he couldn't deliver on the easiest lay-up in history (reducing waste in the US government)?

62355406
>>62355390
He's too honest (autism) for neurotypicals who feel slighted. He has no talent for political scheming

62355408
>>62355406
in other words, that anon is right and elon is retarded

62355415
>>62355408
Your samefagging isn't subtle at all

62355422
>>62355222
>GDP
Why are you comparing the monetary turnover in a country with the market value of a company?
The market value of the land in Poland alone is probably 25 trillion $+.

62355426
>>62355390
Do you actually think it's easy to get the Government to agree to cutting waste?

62355462
>>62355426
I think it would help to go after actual waste and not hare brained bullshit like the National Weather Service and air traffic controllers. He got a bunch of kids to ctrl+f buzzwords in goverment documents and kill anything that mentioned them. Once the US started running into problems running basic infrastructure because of le reddit man they fired him.

62355530
>>62355415
I'll differentfag him then, he is correct. I wouldn't voote for any of these two fake parties though.

item.title: >can't buy a home in this econom-AAACK — 28 replies — 39.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
>can't buy a home in this econom-AAACK

Open thread • Replies: 28 • Updated: 2026-06-12 09:58 UTC

OP

>can't buy a home in this econom-AAACK

Early replies (first 3)

62353845
>just buy a cuckshack in a suburb of one of the most niggerest cities in america

no thanks moshe

62353882
That is NOT 295k home

62353884
>>62353836
1361 sqft pod is not a home

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62353934
>>62353836
$300K for a below-average sized home in the suburbs of Kansas city is insane.

62353969
>>62353836
30k house in 1990

62354018
>>62353836
Sorry OP but this house is too gay for me

62354021
>>62353836
Wait are you saying $300k is the current affordable price for a starter home?

62354024
>>62354018
>TFW I will never be a secretly gay man in 1950s suburban Kansas
Why even live?!?

62354058
>American wood huts

62354061
2 windows and a door, 300k
LMAO

62354129
>>62354021
Yes? You can't even get a small 80sqm apartment for less than $300k in Eastern Europe dude.

62354325
>>62354129
Why would anyone want to live in eastern Europe?

62354331
>>62354024
Youre absolutely right. Time to kill yourself.

62354391
Is that near where BTK’s house was?

62354397
>>62354061
>windows only on the top floor

62354401
>>62353845
Skill issue

62354404
>>62354325
>Why would anyone want to live in eastern Europe?

Cute slav gf, safety, low tax (depends on country), no niggers, the benefits are limitless

62354425
>>62353836
>garage randomly smaller than the actual house and on a different level, makes house look lopsided
>plastic columns on the porch that dont actually support any load
>fronting looks like its painted corrugated steel
>random moonlight windoe situated directly above the front door
>no windows for the bottom floor
>gutters on the left side already trying to make a break for it, warped against the flush of the house
>right hedge literally hovering over the lawn
>decorative window shutters that don't look like they cover the whole window
>foundation cracking visible near the steps to the driveway
>looking like they put a two story, belowground basement house on a concrete platform, all while it looks like a cargo shipping container with stairs
>all in the middle of bumfuck kansas

You would have to literally pay me to live here. I would pay 0 dollars for this shitbox.

62354923
>>62353836
>Cardboard cuckshed
>200k
>Affordable

Suck my dick OP

62354929
>>62353836
>$300K for that
That's a $100K house tops

62354951
>>62354425
>all while it looks like a cargo shipping container with stairs
I hate this most of all, and none of these houses are truly worth $300,000. I wish we'd start to see mass layoffs and a true Great Depression so boomers will no longer afford their houses and be forced to sell, driving down prices.
Great Depression 2.0 can't come soon enough, too many eaters not enough producers in this economy.

62355138
>>62353836
FML

62355398
not having a house is correlated with permanently lower relationship success

it's literally sink or swim. make enough money somehow, win the system or die a virgin cursed to live with your parents.

62355436
>>62355398
This desperation to get a mid or below gf/wife has cursed so many men. lol.

62355439
>>62355436
why even bother making money. if I dont have a house by 30 i'm ending it man im sorry.

62355450
>>62355398
So desperate to move out to shack up with some girl you would not even jerk off to is hilarious.
The reality for the majority of men is this: undesirable to girls outside of betabuxxing. You even mentioned “die a virgin cursed to live with your parents” which was perfect because majority of males couldn’t even get sex when they were 10-20, during a full decade where girls were exclusively dating/banging the top 10% and have absolutely 0 pressure to date/marry bottom 90% men. These bottom 90% men are so desperate they usually end up like you said, shackling up with a girl who is over 21 and seeing signs of aging and will only date/bang the betamale if he provides.

62355456
>>62353836
what compels someone to make these same shit threads over and over? childhood molestation? being a gay retard? low IQ?

62355464
>>62355439
The majority of men, the bottom 90% of men, are better off staying at home for another decade at least and building their wealth instead of being with a woman who would have ignored him if she was still under 20.

item.title: Chainlinkies are the ones that try to make fun of XRP chads by spamming the boom-meme. — 39 replies — 31.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlinkies are the ones that try to make fun of XRP chads by spamming the boom-meme.

Open thread • Replies: 39 • Updated: 2026-06-12 09:26 UTC

OP

Chainlinkies are the ones that try to make fun of XRP chads by spamming the boom-meme. Look at this poster who copies and pastes an entire thread just to shit it up and make fun of XRP holders: >>62338460

The funny thing? He forgot to remove the (You) when he copied and pasted the whole thing. But you can see his ID is different.

So my best guess is it's probably a single poster who constantly switches id to force this shitty meme. Probably a chainlink bagholder.

Early replies (first 3)

62339778
Imagine caring this much, holy shit. Adult bully victim no doubt

62339781
>>62339778
Lol of course I don't care so much but it goes to show how pathetic those link tards are trying to force that unfunny boom-xrp meme. The guy thinks if he switches id it looks like more people are in on it but that retard forgot to remove the (You) from his own post.

You are just butthurt you got called out hard and i'm gonna show this to everyone on /biz/ so they know who is really responsible for forcing that dumb meme.

62339829
>>62339778
idk bout that... xrp apparently lives rent free in linkbaggies minds

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62340365
>>62339768
>Chainlinkies are the ones that try to make fun of XRP chads by spamming the boom-meme.
GIGABOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!

62340374
>>62339768
Why would anyone buy Chainlink or xrp I don't understand. Crypto is there to buy drugs online. Can you buy drugs online with Chainlink ? No. Can you buy drugs online with xrp? No. Case closed.

62340393
>>62339768
I don't hold link either tho
KABOOOOOOOOOOOM

62340516
everybody hates u dumb stinks

62340978
>>62339781
>words words words
It's funny how you're immediately identifiable by the spergy seethe that radiates from your posts.

Even funnier, >>62339844 posting the madmen meme.
>"We don't think about Linkies at all!!"
>Op literally creates a thread ranting about Chainlink because some other random thread that doesn't mention Chainlink could have been made by a Linkie

62340989
>>62340978
>TLDR linkjeet seethe

didnt read lol

62340992
BOOOOOOOOOOM

BULLISH AT XRP

62341232
Bumping this bullsih thread
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62342495
>>62339768
>My retarded shitposts made someone so mad he made an expose thread on me
FXCKING BULLISH KABOOOOOOOOOOOM

62343674
>>62339768
>>62339781
>>62339835
>>62340989
>linkcucks and xrpaypigs having a retarded biz slapfight as they both go to 0

62344317
KABOOOOOOOOM>>62339768

62344795
>>62339781
This. I don't hold either but the link spam is so fucking stupid and annoying. They got decimated in a war length campaign of threads and saw zero wins and now it is over and over with this same shitty failed meme that ironically got funny when XRP posters just did it back to them to mock them. I have zero dog in this race but XRP is the clear winner in the messaging war.

62344908
>>62344795
>t. the same person a different id
manufacturing consensus on a dead board is pretty cringe desu senpai

62345267
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOOM
link

62345354
Except XRP is actually being used

62347256
KABOOOOOOOOM

62347334
>>62344795
BOOOOOOOOOOM YOU HOLD XRP

62347434
>>62339781
>”I don’t care”
>paragraph about how much he cares

62347439
>>62339768
Both LINK and XRP are gay

62348331
I mean…it’s pretty hard not to cope and seethe with pictures like this

62348340
>>62348331
Must....not......boom...must...not.......
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM
BULLISH AT THE TICKER XRP

62349668
>>62344908
You are incapable of conceiving of someone who just calls out your hypocrisy and annoying shilling. This is why you are how you are and you are like this because you do this. It is circular and self-feeding and swallowing. You are in a vortex, accusing me of doing exactly what you are in an even more retarded way than you are even accusing me of doing.
>>62347334
See the above reply. Same applies to you.

62349808
>>62349668
You are the verbose xrp shill though. You made this >>62349672 reply to the xrp general minutes after this one here in the same verbose style.

62349917
>>>62349808
Mentally ill VPN linkbaggie

62350205
>>62349808
It is indeed extremely obvious whenever he posts. Lately he is always talking about "muh XRP kept it's gains from the Trump pump!" yet XRP is down 70% from the ATH it made during said pump. Insanely delusional.

62354048
Hello linkers and ripplies. Actually, XRPL uses Chainlink.
XRP is powered by Chainlink.

62354051
Why is link and Cardano falling at the same time?

62354245
>>62354051
two useless pieces of shit falling together. why wouldn't they?

62354644
>>62339768
BOOOOOOOOOOM

62355365
KABOOOOOOOOOOOM!

item.title: >tfw 102 IQ >and it was an online test so its probably lower my nigger life is so aids if i was 120 IQ i would be workin… — 8 replies — 19.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
>tfw 102 IQ >and it was an online test so its probably lower my nigger life is so aids if i was 120 IQ i would be workin…

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-06-12 10:16 UTC

OP

>tfw 102 IQ
>and it was an online test so its probably lower

my nigger life is so aids if i was 120 IQ i would be working at meta or some FAANG making bank.. or doing EE making less but decent money and building cool shit

Early replies (first 3)

62355442
>>62355434
Not necessarily
t. 140 iq test score who is unemployed and applying for entry level cyber security

62355445
I'm too scared to take an IQ test because I like to think I'm more intelligent than I probably really am.

62355448
>>62355442
wow 140 is insane. did u just not try in school? I got raped in school starting in 6th grade i learned so slow. Managed to get my bachelors because school is so watered down in US

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62355457
>>62355445
IQ tests are just one of many types of intelligence
I bc routinely got the highest test scores in school and didn’t even graduate college
I would rather be able to tear down and rebuild a v8 engine as a form of intelligence
Midwits always win in the end anyways. The goal should be to not be on either end of the bell curve if you want happiness

62355459
>>62355434
>my nigger life is so aids if i was 120 IQ i would be working at meta or some FAANG making bank.. or doing EE making less but decent money and building cool shit

If you were smarter, you would understand why this rarely happens. Only a modest % of people at 120 or higher work jobs that lucrative.

62355468
>>62355434
IQcells iqrape themselves constantly

Your IQ isnt holding you back, but your AQ is.
The only /biz/ advice I can give is to do more shit, and to stick with it longer than youre comfortable with.

I can tell you expect everything to be handed to u

62355469
>>62355448
Taking tests is only one part of school. I could always show up and ace tests, math a little less so because they want you to show your work and I often skip steps but just know the answer
It really depended on the teacher plus I was always popular so I rather drink beer, fight black people, and sleep with girls when I was in school. Public school in California was fun tho

62355503
>>62355448
Test limit here, got patents, had a few companies, became a millionaire and got crushed several times, now retired shitposter. The key trait is not pattern mapping BS, but having no empathy. Most people who get rich do really really stupid things, but they do it relentlessly. My biz 101: Marketing + political connection >>>> product, quid pro quo, marginal cost of action, needs behind demands, focus on getting income from government, VC, customers, in that order.

item.title: Why was the GBA the most soulful portable — 8 replies — 12.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why was the GBA the most soulful portable

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-06-12 10:02 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62355145
because you were le kid
gayboy advance is a shovelware machine with no games

62355293
>>62355131
GBA was kinda ass, I had that one skateboarding game, some racing game and one other game that wasn't memorable.

I don't even remember what I did with mine.

DS was also not great.

62355297
>>62355293
Take... that... back...
The DS was sigma.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62355318
ni66a looks like mario

62355382
>>62355131
For me, it's the gameboy colour.

62355386
>>62355145
It had my favorite Fire Emblems and Pokemons. Other than that... I guess there was a Final Fantasy Tactics game

62355420
>>62355131
carl winslow my beloved

62355475
>>62355131
Someone tell that nigger to stop appropriating my culture, thanks.

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-06-12 10:02 UTC

OP

Some breaking xrp news

Early replies (first 3)

62351536
Remember when Brad said he didnt want to support the clarity act?

62351601
>>62351406
Why do you keep making these corny linkie threads to cope with objectively losing?
>>62351536
He literally never said that. He said he would support a bill which served crypto and would oppose one which didn't in the very early days of the formulation when the Clarity Act was leaning a bad direction. He has literally posted to mark up and pass it repeatedly and been lobbying for its passage on mainstream news on Fox Business. Why would you choose to be so low IQ and frustrated rather than change your thesis based on what's true? INSANE cope.

62354640
>>62351406

62355367

item.title: 5x lever up before it's too late — 9 replies — 6.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
5x lever up before it's too late

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-06-12 09:21 UTC

OP

Best chart in the game rn and the best part is you're gonna find out today if it moons and we get continuation or the rally dies.The tables been set for a blast after the rejection of that big red yesterday. Unlike Jeeterliquid there are also 0 unlocks for the rest of the year with double the buyback of hype. These guys are in bed with US regulators and backed by Robinhood, Peter Thiel's Founders Fund etc, this will be the onshore perps play, 0 fees for retail. DYOR anon, there's something here.

Early replies (first 3)

62355220
>>62355213
It must be miserable chasing pumps instead of investing in guaranteed gains. I know 2017 and 2021 were exciting but that shit was 9 and 5 years ago respectively. You're like a guy in 2007 nostalgic for Pets.com

62355226
>rn fr fr yo
All of the 'hype killers' ended up killed and even hype is getting fucked in the ass.

62355229
>>62355220
>2021 was 5 years ago
That's impossible, it's only 2023. I'm not old and behind the times. Trump 2024 will save us.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62355266
>>62355226
hype is on its 2nd week in the red while LIT has been lit green for 4 straight, the relative strength is undeniable. This is a layup and supported by fundamentals not just a good chart. Hyperliquid did 6.2x the volume last 24hrs while being 38x more expensive. Hype is overhyped and LIT has the inside route to the US market, time to wake up.

62355269
>>62355213
sssh anon, /biz/ isn't for actual alpha anymore. 2016 is long gone.

Quietly accumulating LIT during this bear market cycle, the gains are going to be insane next bull cycle.

62355292
>>62355269
there's a huge safety net until 2027 too because there's 0 new LIT coming to market while buybacks churn. HYPE has already ran hard and has monthly unlocks and a bunch of overleveraged long muppets, better risk reward is now with LIT imo.

62355328
Hope it doesn't end up like BAT

62355341
>>62355328
Real revenue automatically buying back a token vs a browser rewards token for watching ads

62355350
>>62355213
LIT, HYPE AND ASTER are unironically my top picks for the bullrun

OP

62345879

62345931
>>62345842

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62345936
>>62345931
Fair. Monero or privacy crypto could have been world changing, except you can never cash out or buy anything with it

62345958
>>62345936
By design.

62345960
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62345970
most of the so called utility coins have been around for 14-15 years, if they were actually going to do something they would have 10 times already. Even the fucking dotcom boom crashed and recovered in half the time. What else is there to wait for? Clarity Act? Don't make me laugh.

62346026
>>62345970
You could have held Walmart and apple for 20 years before it really took off, 12 years for Amazon…so you’re a retard

62346045
>>62345960
Does nothing for the xrp price

62346051
>>62345960
>30+ partners

62347125
>>62346045
I’ve been holding XRP for years, but no single good news has pumped its prices. Even when XRP got clarity in court, its price only went up measly 40 cents before it dumped back down. You can declare XRP intergalactic bridge currency, but it will still dump or crab. This is because they’re using bots to suppress the price, which has been documented for a long time.

62349844
>>62347125
>hurr xrp doesn't pump on news and is suppressed
You're an idiot.
XRP did a 2x after the lawsuit ended, and Bitcoin even pumped to help it.

62350438
>>62349844
>You're an idiot
>BTC/USDT chart

62350641
Back then, at $3.20 in 2018
>xrp is going to go to a gorillion dollars because everything will have to use it!
Now, at $1.15
>um ackshually competition is healthy we never claimed we'd run world finance, it's no big deal that everywhere xrp shows up its in a list alongside a bunch of things we claim are ponzis, because we have no moat or exclusivity that matches our original retarded claims... surely it will go to a gorillion dollars anyway!

Lmfao

62350676
>>62345960
Listed alongside ave, solana, and lovable!
Now THATS what I call an xrp monopoly
BOOOOOOOOOOM

62350963
>>62350438
>and Bitcoin even pumped to help it

readin be hard n shiet yo

62351911
>>62350963
I said the price only went up measly 40 cents before it dumped back down. However, the price actually went less from 45c to 76c, then back to 40 cents the next day. Even if this was 2x, it would still be under a dollar after being declared non-security. Random shit crypto after win like this would shot up past two dollars minimum. Fucking brainded retarded monkey nigger.

62352005
>>62345842
It was always a scam but at least it keeps the worst of us poor
>imagine buying the crypto bankers supposedly would use

62352186
>>62345842
>>62345876
>brings up chainlink every time xrp is criticized
why do they do this

62353366
>>62352186
Because xrpaypigs cope by comparing themselves to cucklink and couldn't possibly imagine that *everybody* laughs at them.

62354985
>>62351911
>I said the price only went up measly 40 cents before it dumped back down
Which was a 2x.
Because XRP was around 40 cents before it pumped another 40 cents.

>to 76c
Even on CMC's line chart it went over 80c.
And the candles show it wicked to 90c.

>then back to 40 cents the next day
It took a month before it even went back under 60 cents.

And this is all with Bitcoin's help.

item.title: (srs post) thoughts on my nostradamus'ing? Good? Meh? Dumb? — 9 replies — 4.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
(srs post) thoughts on my nostradamus'ing? Good? Meh? Dumb?

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-06-12 08:46 UTC

OP

June 11: chop as market gets ready for pump on spacex trading day

June 12 - June 16: iran FUD is metabolized and market goes up on spacex


June 17 - June 22: FOMC on June 16 EOD causes fud, plus more iran fears

June 22 - Oct 10: NDQ floats upwards 40% while S&P chops and eventually goes up 10%

Oct 10: NDQ reaches a generational top - OpenAI IPOs - Fed announces more hikes due to AI labor inflation - republicans lose congress making trump a lame duck president = no more stimulus grift to pump markets
Oct 10, 2026 - ~Oct 10 2027: as a consequence of the lame duck presidency and the lack of stimulus and the selling of AI venture capital bags onto retail, S&P sells off 40% to round trip all the way back down to 5000

~Oct 10 2027: anthropic ipos

~Oct 10 2027 onwards: pretty much a new 20 year cycle begins and most likely the end of humanity as we birth sentience of machines.

Early replies (first 3)

62349969
you need to factor in the wc which is the biggest npc bread & circus event in modern history

62349972
>>62349960
i just matched up the timelines for 1973 and 2000 btw, that's where I'm getting the play by play for things. I reckon the trading AI's are probably averaging the two together given the macro environment

62349980
>>62349969
ah good point, ya so that might erase the june 17 - june 22 fud period and we go straight into june 22 - oct 10 period

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62350015
>>62349960
Eh. I think they'll just turn shit up to 11 because Bank of America lost.

62352238
biz, so far my prediction is working, stop posting on 1pbtid pepe threads, and let me know if my predictions are shit or not

62353716
snailposting this shit since you retards only want to respond to 1pbtid's

62353764
>>62353716
It'll be a lost decade. It'll take 5-7 years for first new nuclear reactors to come online to unclog the the backlog of ai data centers that will be getting shit canned later this year or next after the crash.

Commodities will be the main play. World needs real resources to build infrastructure and robots. Shit doesn't mine itself out of the ground.

62353866
>>62353764
thanks, yea, seems to be that way. Right around 1973 market peak to 1975ish, gold picked up a 2x bid, so I imagine other commodities would follow suit

It's hard to imagine though, because I look around and I still to this day don't see labor inflation, yet everyone is speaking about how all this build out is happening. If it's happening, why doesn't it show up in labor? That's the first bottleneck that'll show up, no? It showed up in 08, are we saying all the mining and manufacturing just simply doesn't require that many humans? That seems a little bit farfetched to me

62355245
>>62349960
elf

item.title: NUCLEAR HAPPENING — 15 replies — 4.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
NUCLEAR HAPPENING

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-06-12 07:23 UTC

OP

COINBASE NOW ALLOWS AI AGENTS TO TRADE CRYPTO AUTONOMOUSLY

Early replies (first 3)

62352704
Institutions were doing this 4+ years ago, will change nothing.

62352713
Who care Robin hood did it first

Also I think thos agentic stuff might be overhyped, I ran bots before and idk why I would switch to an ai that hallucinates

62352715
>>62352687
Sharper /pol/ + /b/‑style mock

“NUCLEAR HAPPENING”
Calm down, doomsday prophet — Coinbase letting AI trade crypto isn’t the Cuban Missile Crisis.

You’re acting like ChatGPT just seized the launch codes when all it did was place a limit order on DOGE at 3 AM.

This isn’t Skynet, it’s a robo‑intern buying your bags because you can’t stop doomscrolling long enough to click “confirm trade.”

The only meltdown here is your brain trying to process a press release.

Even sharper (still safe)

Bro saw “AI agents can rebalance your portfolio” and immediately started building a fallout shelter out of Amazon boxes.

Coinbase: adds a convenience feature

OP: “THE MACHINES HAVE RISEN.”

Relax, Nostradamus. The AI isn’t overthrowing humanity — it’s just making sure you stop panic‑selling at the bottom.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62352728
i will outcompete them easily

market buy @40K
market sell @180K

I'm the most handsome man on 4chan

62352738
>>62352687
AI can't do that yet, so "agent" is the correct word, i.e. a model that can't trade gets stupid bandaid skills context from users, in the hope to bait them into losing money.
First thing I did with the new v5 model from Anthropic is stock assessment, it's still too weakly willed to form an opinion, it still just mirrors your sentiment.

62352773
>>62352687
nobody cares about "muh crypto" any more boomer. wake up

62352788
>>62352773

8
shadow
not first edition

into the trash it goes

62352838
>>62352788
k ill take it out of your trash

62352840
>>62352788
Should I get it graded?

62352936
>>62352773
>nobody cares
Pretty much this. Not even coinbase has that kind of pull anymore to get people’s attention. Base was OK in the beginning but it turned out to be yet another liquidity farm for insiders. For years, crypto had a bad rep but the last couple of years, along with the sol shitcoin casino, basically finished it off.

62352979
>>62352773
>now the cryptards will try to kill pokemon for threatening their ecosystem

62353423
>>62352773
You really need that faggot chain to work out huh. You've been shilling for the last week. KYS people on this board trade metals,crypto, and stock. That is a mentally retarded tranny "asset" I will NEVER view artificial scarcity trading cards as an investment.

62353565
>>62352687
this was happening their first year of the Coinbase foundation in 2015, moron.

62355014
>>62352773

item.title: BTC — 15 replies — 3.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
BTC

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-06-12 06:22 UTC

OP

Did anyone figure out why the value seems to be cyclical?
Whats the best exchange and wallet for a new to investing anon?

Early replies (first 3)

62347134
>>62347031
so they can continuously pump and dump and pretend it's simply "natural" and "mathematical" and whatever other bullshit marketing they do

62347139
>>62347031
>cycles
Human psychology

>exchange
Kraken

>wallet
Your memory, but I’ll let other people shill their products below

62347162
>>62347139
He's new to it. Start with the Bluewallet app on your phone, look for more secure alternatives as you go.

https://bitcoin.org/en/choose-your-wallet

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62347465
Thank you for your helpful responses frens

62347618
>>62347031
Its a self fulfilling prophecy at this point but it started because of the halving.

62347821
>>62347031
>Did anyone figure out why the value seems to be cyclical?
each 4 years there is a halving

>Whats the best exchange and wallet for a new to investing anon?
4chin censors the reply, probably site is run by some retards
b. core
change b. to full name of the coin
tripple check sources before install

source: og here

62347830
>>62347031

62348122
>>62347821
So the "b . Org" is the wrong one?

I hate how predatory search engines are now that we are the product

62350049
>>62348122
bitcoin core is the real program, og

bitcoin core dot org is the site
but also/better check github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin

62350055
>>62348122
>>62350049
bitcoin.org is the original site, yes, it has a list of wallets, including the bitcoincore main wallet

to get rich/avoid getting poor:
- keep backups
- doublecheck backups
- make more backups
- document how you restore and use backups, so if you give up on btc and find this back in 10 years you can recover it still
- more backups, in case of a fire

- do NOT keep money on exchange, withdraw
- do NOT move all money at once. go slow. send, wait hours, verify, continue
- just buy weekly or "daily" (daily cost averaging). buy more if it falls a lot
- never sell it all

62350264
>>62350055
That is very helpful, thank you :)

62350298
>>62350055
checked && self custody is for retards.

62350304
>>62347139
>Human psychology
Jewish psychology

62350478
>>62350264
cheers

also avoid altcoins. they don't plug into a printer even

62354917
paper wallet
